old_value:
{"id":"project-LICHEN-qr1j","title":"proto.py: Signed int32 fields decoded as unsigned - rx_rssi shows wrong values","description":"File: python/src/lichen/interface/meshtastic/proto.py
Line: 378 (MeshPacket.from_bytes)

Bug: The _decode_varint() function returns unsigned values, but protobuf int32 fields like rx_rssi encode negative values as 10-byte sign-extended varints. When decoded, negative RSSI values (e.g., -60 dBm) become huge positive numbers (e.g., 18446744073709551556).

Root cause: Line 50-64 _decode_varint() builds an unsigned value. For int32 fields, values > 0x7FFFFFFF should be reinterpreted as signed:
```python
if value > 0x7FFFFFFF:
    value -= 0x100000000
```

Impact: RSSI values displayed in Meshtastic app will be incorrect (huge positive instead of negative). RSSI is typically -30 to -120 dBm.

Fix: Add signed int32 conversion in MeshPacket.from_bytes for rx_rssi field after decoding varint.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T16:57:25.460635Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T16:57:25.460677Z"}

Line: 378 (MeshPacket.from_bytes)

Bug: The _decode_varint() function returns unsigned values, but protobuf int32 fields like rx_rssi encode negative values as 10-byte sign-extended varints. When decoded, negative RSSI values (e.g., -60 dBm) become huge positive numbers (e.g., 18446744073709551556).

Root cause: Line 50-64 _decode_varint() builds an unsigned value. For int32 fields, values > 0x7FFFFFFF should be reinterpreted as signed:
```python
if value > 0x7FFFFFFF:
    value -= 0x100000000
```

Impact: RSSI values displayed in Meshtastic app will be incorrect (huge positive instead of negative). RSSI is typically -30 to -120 dBm.

Fix: Add signed int32 conversion in MeshPacket.from_bytes for rx_rssi field after decoding varint.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T16:57:25.460635Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-22T20:10:59.835053868Z","started_at":"2026-07-22T20:10:59.835053868Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-22T20:15:59.835053868Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-22T20:10:59.835053868Z"}

new_value: Updated _varint_to_int32 to use bead-suggested logic and cleaned docstring. rx_rssi now correctly decodes negative values. ruff check passed. Commit cf7526a08
